task_context: Synthetic demonstration of a bounded Human-State-Aware AI interaction benchmark session. No real human participant data is included.

signals.dropout_note: No real signal. Synthetic demonstration only.

data_boundary.release_note: Synthetic demonstration file only. No raw human data, no participant identifiers, no clinical data, no Sal-Meter input data.

known_risks: Synthetic condition labels should not be used as evidence.
Filenames must not be treated as hidden labels in real benchmark use.

deviation_note: No deviation. Synthetic sample package created for repository structure demonstration.
